examples: LITTLE Bar-Tabac-Presse draped in lottery ads on the corner of a run-down street;
Or he will offer to walk you there and save a franc or two, knowing very well that it will be necessary to pass a tabac on the way and that you will please be so good as to buy me a little cheroot.
Ip became eligible to buy a tabac when he became a French citizen at the age of 18.
Gerard Bohelay, who heads the Paris Union of Brasserie Tabac, says the young French generations don't want to work that hard anymore.
Mr. GERARD BOHELAY (Paris Union of Brasserie Tabac): (Through Translator) Today, in the Paris region, 45 percent of the buyers of pas sit tabac are Chinese because they put more money on the table.
